findings.finding: Plan T5 verification only validates that the cutoff fixture parses as ISO-8601, with no invariant that the cutoff value is later than the max ts of clarify_critic events already on disk in active lifecycle trees.
findings.evidence_quote: test -f tests/fixtures/jsonl_emission_cutoff.txt && python3 -c "from datetime import datetime; ..."

findings.finding: T5 pytest -x exit-0 verification is non-load-bearing on the parsing path: a silent parse-failure yields exit-0 because no events are flagged as post-cutoff — there is no positive-control assertion that the parser SAW the pre-cutoff event.
